items.claim: Abdul Hussein has a 93% finishing rate on the regional scene.
items.quote: He's a dangerous prospect with a 93% finishing rate. He's got like a record of I think it was 15-2 on the regional scene.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein lost to Muhammad Mokaev.
items.quote: He also lost to Muhammad Makayv. He's one of the two guys to beat Abdul Hussein

items.claim: Cody Gibson is 0-3 in the UFC on his current run.
items.quote: He's 0 and3 in the UFC on his new run back.

items.claim: Nurullo Aliev is undefeated with a 15-0 record.
items.quote: Yeah, he's a 15-0 undefeated from this Asian region... he's one of the few undefeated fighters left at 155.

items.claim: Mike Davis has only lost to ranked fighters in the UFC.
items.quote: he's only lost to ranked names in the UFC. I believe he's only two losses in the UFC.
